examples: Madame Curie will always be remembered as the discoverer of the element radium.
The radiation radius of the radioactive radium radiator in the stadium is variable.
In 1911 she was awarded the Nobel Prize for Chemistry for the isolation of a pure form of radium.
The radiation is believed to be from radium paint used decades ago on aircraft instruments.
Radon is a gas, a product of decaying radium and an emitter of particles.
